raw_consumer_statement: I was called by a " debt collector '' ( caller id showed experian as caller ) law office of attorney XXXX XXXX.WSithoit my knowledge or without my permission, over {$7000.00} was taken from my barclays JET BLUE credit card.on XX/XX/XXXX. I reached out to company upon realizing what had happened, I found out by viewing my statement. Barclays had no specific answers.talked to several people, transferred to different Departments and extensions. Waited for a follow up. there was none. After a month I called back .this same scenario went on for months, company ( had no previous knowledge of my complaint ) The reps at barclays i spoke with had no knowledge of a case or case number even. approx 6 months went by before i was officially assigned a case number. I received a letter 45 /60 days or so after i was assigned case # .This was at least 7 months after complaint was made. during this time I had inquired on the progress .I again was told i had no case pending. Multiple calls and transfers to correct dept (? ), i could not get answers.30/45 days later i get a letter, we are looking into this, and will let you know soon is basically the message in the correspondence. Finally i get a letter saying that the fraud is being ruled sas fraud and i should see an adjustment that could take up to 2 business cycles. when 3 months passed i call again ( over 40 hrs of phone calls ) they said wait one more month.no changes in statement, then I call and am told case had been closed! had to reopen, I did so.almost a year later i submitted another complaint /claim. received a phone call to write a letter to the presidents office.I did so. again another 30 = days i get a call from alleged presidents office letting me know my request had been denied. no real explanation, i asked for investigation results, what they had found etc, and was told there was no investigation .they didnt have to look further because it was " keyed in " and furthermore they do not compensate fraud .I then contacted presidents office, no call back .then i recieved a call in XXXX  XXXX ( XXXX now ) from someone in presidents office letting me no they are not going any further and that initial decision is final.Also mduring tis time a variety of charges made by XXXX XXXX  such as spokeo several times were investigated as fraud and removed from my account balance.
